basic_details.short_information: Yantra India Limited (YIL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Company Secretary. Candidates with ICSI Can Apply Offline. The candidate shall apply offline through YIL official website ddpdoo.gov.in.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 15 days from the date of publication of Advertisement

qualification.education_qualification: Associate/Fellow Member of ICSI, Working knowledge of computer, Minimum 5 years post qualification experience as Company Secretary in a company registered under Companies Act

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for YIL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: YIL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
